title: Context menu smart sort — global favorites
description:
Right-click menu usage sorting now lifts your most-used actions to the top of the whole menu (Line, Eraser, Bookmark catalog compete globally), not only within each section.

Also fixes pref reads merging localStorage with server prefs so counts are not lost when sync returns an empty object.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg55).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Smart sort: frequently used menu actions pinned to top across all sections.
Merge local + Wasabi ctxMenuUsage counts on read.
Plan-view eraser toolbar picks now bump menu priority.
